remember: Recall the methods of measurement in various sports.
Identify the tools and techniques used for evaluation in sports.
List the importance of measurement and evaluation in sports.
understand: Explain the significance of measurement and evaluation in sports performance.
Describe the types of data collected during measurement and evaluation.
Interpret the results of measurement and evaluation in sports.
apply: Apply the concepts of measurement and evaluation in various sports situations.
Use the tools and techniques of measurement and evaluation to assess sports performance.
Develop a plan for measurement and evaluation in a specific sport.
analyze: Analyze the data collected during measurement and evaluation to identify trends and patterns.
Evaluate the effectiveness of measurement and evaluation methods in sports.
Synthesize the results of measurement and evaluation to improve sports performance.

ncert_objectives: Understand the importance of measurement and evaluation in sports.
Recognize the role of measurement and evaluation in improving sports performance.
Apply the concepts of measurement and evaluation in various sports situations.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the methods of measurement in sports.
Describe the tools and techniques used for evaluation in sports.
Discuss the importance of measurement and evaluation in sports performance.
